bird.name: Luzon island thrush
bird.summary: Luzon island thrush (Turdus thomassoni) is a species of passerine in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to the island of Luzon in the Phili…

locations.name: Mounts Banahaw–San Cristobal Protected Landscape
locations.summary: Mounts Banahaw–San Cristobal Protected Landscape is a protected landscape park in the Calabarzon region of the Philippi…

locations.name: Mount Isarog
locations.summary: Isarog is an active stratovolcano located in the province of Camarines Sur, Philippines, on the island of Luzon.

locations.name: 馬榮火山
locations.summary: 馬榮火山（英語：Mayon Volcano），或稱馬永火山，是位於菲律賓呂宋島東南部的活複式火山，它那近乎完美的圓錐形山體，號稱「最完美的圓錐體」，同時也是世界上輪廓最完整的火山，日本富士山僅次於它，且經常被人拿來和日本的富士山相比美，是…

locations.name: 布盧桑火山
locations.summary: 布盧桑火山（Mount Bulusan、Bulusan Volcano）是菲律賓呂宋島南部索索貢省的火山。標高1,565公尺。 布魯桑火山最近一次噴發在2011年2月。

relations.subject: Luzon island thrush
relations.evidence: It occurs in tropical moist montane forest and forest edges above altitudes of 1,000 m
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Luzon island thrush
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss due to deforestation through mining, logging and conversion of habitat into farmland
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Luzon island thrush

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
